# --- Builder Stage ---
FROM rust:1.70 as builder
WORKDIR /usr/src/tensor_weave

# Install build-time dependencies
RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y \
    libopenblas-dev \
    liblapack-dev \
    gfortran \
    pkg-config

COPY Cargo.toml Cargo.lock ./
COPY src ./src

# Build release binary
RUN cargo build --release

# --- Runtime Stage ---
FROM debian:bullseye-slim

# Install runtime libs and dumb-init
RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y \
    libopenblas-base \
    libssl1.1 \
    ca-certificates \
    dumb-init \
    && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# Create non-root user
RUN groupadd -r tensor && useradd -r -g tensor tensor

WORKDIR /app
COPY --from=builder /usr/src/tensor_weave/target/release/tensor_weave /app/tensor_weave
COPY --from=builder /usr/src/tensor_weave/src/config /app/config

# Set ownership
RUN chown -R tensor:tensor /app

# Switch to non-root
USER tensor

# Use dumb-init to handle signals
ENTRYPOINT ["/usr/bin/dumb-init", "--"]
CMD ["/app/tensor_weave", "benchmark"]
